ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] I'm sorry to hear about your urgent need for access but as a guardian of this realm and its secrets, my duty is firstly to maintain order here at East Watch Gate before granting entry into our royal archive where matters are kept secure from prying eyes. The argument you overheard between the traders could be disruptive if not addressed immediately; it's essential

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>The baseline lacks both relevance and personality, offering no context or connection with the persona of a royal guardian at East Watch Gate. It also fails to address any natural dialogue flow in this scenario.
